name: Gold
description: This is the official GOLD token of Hyperscape. Hyperscape is an open-source MMORPG available in the browser, as well as on iOS, Android, and desktop platforms. 1 $GOLD = 1 gold in Hyperscape. The utility of this token is that it allows you to be the richest person in Hyperscape at launch. There will also be limited-edition items available exclusively to $GOLD holders. Developers can contribute here: https://github.com/HyperscapeAI/hyperscape
